nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

en.lifeSummary: Colban MacDuff Earl of Fife was born about 1235, in Fife, Scotland. He married Anne Alice Durward de Ferrers in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.
